use_cases: Swap one cryptocurrency token for another in a DeFi application
Enable users to exchange tokens with real-time price calculations and slippage settings
Integrate into crypto wallets for quick token exchanges
Add swap functionality to decentralized exchange interfaces
Display token balances and 24h price changes during swap operations
ai_summary: A cryptocurrency token swap interface component featuring glass-morphism styling with dark theme aesthetics. Supports selecting source and destination tokens, entering swap amounts with real-time conversion, configurable slippage tolerance, and animated loading/success/error states. Uses Framer Motion for smooth morphing animations between swap states and includes wallet balance display with 24h price change indicators.
